lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass E:\ArcGIS\青海24 祁连防治对象-画面图层 面 # 否 否 "PROJCS["Beijing_1954_3_Degree_GK_CM_99E",GEOGCS["GCS_Beijing_1954",DATUM["D_Beijing_1954",SPHEROID["Krasovsky_1940",6378245.0,298.3]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",99.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];-5123300 -10002300 10000;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;0.001;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 # 与模板相同

SpatialJoin 祁连防治对象-画面图层 祁连_XYTableToPoint E:\ArcGIS\青海24\青海24.gdb\祁连防治对象画面图层_SpatialJoin 一对一连接 KEEP_ALL "Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6,First,#,祁连防治对象-画面图层,Id,-1,-1;序号 "序号" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,序号,-1,-1;行政区 "行政区划名称" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,行政区划名称,0,254;行政_1 "行政区划代码" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,行政区划代码,0,254;流域代 "流域代码" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,流域代码,0,254;所在流 "所在流域" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,所在流域,0,254;经度 "经度" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,经度,-1,-1;纬度 "纬度" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,纬度,-1,-1;防洪能 "防洪能力" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,防洪能力,-1,-1;汇流时 "汇流时间" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,汇流时间,-1,-1;备注 "备注" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,祁连_XYTableToPoint,备注,0,254" "包含 (Clementini)" # # #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.3.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\山洪\项目开发\青海2024年实施方案\16县成果\16县隐患点断面计算-陈浩-202503\001海东6县技术审查成果\2024年空间数据最终版\16县防治对象分布-防治对象\海北三县\祁连防治对象分布</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>祁连防治对象分布.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>人口</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>河流名称</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>河流代码</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>类别</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
